post_text: Camelot Property Management Services Corp. is proud to announce its first residential management engagement in North Miami, Florida. We have been retained to support Three Horizons East Condominium, an established 89-unit condominium community at 12500 NE 15th Avenue, in coordination with the court-appointed receiver, the Association, counsel, unit owners, consultants, and a Florida CAM-licensed affiliate partner. Our role is to help stabilize operations, strengthen financial controls, coordinate vendors and consultants, support compliance and capital planning, and create a disciplined reporting cadence for the property's recovery and long-term health. #PropertyManagement #CondominiumManagement #NorthMiami #SouthFloridaRealEstate #FloridaCondominiumManagement #CommunityAssociationManagement #ReceivershipManagement #MiamiDadeRealEstate #CondoTurnaround #BuildingStabilization #CamelotPropertyManagement

I'm proud to share that Camelot Property Management Services Corp. has begun its first residential management engagement in North Miami, Florida. Three Horizons East Condominium is an 89-unit community at 12500 NE 15th Avenue. This is meaningful for us because it marks Camelot's first South Florida management engagement and represents the kind of work we care about: helping a building regain structure, financial clarity, operating discipline, and long-term confidence. New market, same Camelot approach: hands-on, accountable, owner-minded management. #NorthMiami #SouthFloridaRealEstate #CondoManagement #Receivership #FloridaCAM #PropertyOperations #CamelotPropertyManagement #ThreeHorizonsEast

Camelot Property Management Services Corp. is expanding into North Miami, Florida. We are proud to announce our first South Florida condominium management engagement at Three Horizons East Condominium, an established 89-unit community at 12500 NE 15th Avenue. Camelot will be supporting the receivership stabilization process with a focus on financial controls, vendor accountability, compliance coordination, capital planning, maintenance oversight, and stronger communication. #NorthMiamiFL #MiamiDade #FloridaCondominiums #CommunityAssociation #BuildingOperations #CondoRecovery #CamelotPropertyManagement
